name: REMIC Residual Interest Loss Pass-Thru

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must hold a residual interest in a Real Estate Mortgage Investment Conduit (REMIC). Deductions are limited to the taxpayer's adjusted basis in the interest, with an indefinite carryforward for excess losses.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Holders of residual interests in a REMIC can deduct their daily portion of the REMIC's net loss as an ordinary loss.
